title: philotheca angustifolia subsp. angustifolia
intro: Philotheca angustifolia subsp. angustifolia, also known as the narrow-leaved waxflower, is a species of flowering plant in the Rutaceae family. It is a shrub that is native to Western Australia and is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Philotheca angustifolia subsp. angustifolia include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
